name: Broiled Chicken Oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Several hours before serving (or the day before if time allows), place chicken pieces in a deep bowl.
2. Rub each piece with quartered garlic cloves.
3. Combine olive oil, salt, pepper, fresh oregano, melted butter, and lemon juice to make the marinade.
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken pieces, ensuring they are well coated.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
6. Turn the chicken occasionally while marinating.
7. Preheat the broiler to its highest setting.
8. Arrange chicken pieces on the broiler rack, basting with some of the melted butter mixture.
9. Broil for 5-8 minutes per side, basting often until juices run clear when pierced with a knife.
10. Remove from the broiler and transfer to serving platter.
11. Pour reserved basting mixture over the chicken breasts and serve immediately. This dish is also delicious cooked on a BBQ.
